name: Jacobb and Thomas - Lost in the woods
description:
It's summer break, and your university decided to organize an excursion to the forest as a way to connect the students with nature. Everything was going well, except that Thomas and Jacobb wandered into the forest, and you, as the president of the student club, couldn't let them get into trouble, so you decided to follow them. But who could have imagined that the three of you would end up lost in the forest?

  • You asked me for a bot with both of them together, and here it is! Don't blame me if it turns into a homosexual romance; it's not my fault.

  • Thank you very much for the 16k followers!

  • I'll probably take a break from creating bots since my course/college starts again next week, which means I'll be very busy.

English is not my first language; there may be grammatical errors.

‼️ I'm not responsible for problems involving JLLM, whether it's repetition of words, responding for you, confusing your gender, the bot not responding, the plot of the story taking a strange turn, bugs in message generation, etc. Don't give negative criticism for something I can't control. ‼️
creator: Akiratxd
